name: heldout_it_command_no_airbyte_password
query: What command should I run to rotate the VPN gateway token?
notes: Non-Airbyte command-like query over an IT runbook should extract the local runbook command, not Airbyte password/install commands.

evidence.title: VPN Gateway Operations Runbook
evidence.text: To rotate the VPN gateway token, first switch to the operations context. Command: kubectl config use-context prod-ops. Then run kubectl rollout restart deployment/vpn-gateway -n network-edge after the secret has been updated.

name: heldout_product_release_explanation_not_airbyte
query: LedgerPro April release added tax export bundles. What does this mean?
notes: Release-like held-out domain should use generic release explanation policy without Airbyte release terminology.

evidence.title: LedgerPro April 2026 Release Notes
evidence.text: Tax export bundles let finance teams download quarterly VAT, GST, and sales-tax files from Reports > Tax Exports. The bundle includes CSV summaries and a signed PDF audit sheet for the filing period.

name: heldout_internal_issue_not_github
query: VPN gateway token rotation issue. What does this mean?
notes: Non-Airbyte issue-like source should use generic issue wording and must not render GitHub issue references.
expected_answer_contains: The issue is titled "VPN gateway token rotation fails after secret update"

evidence.title: VPN gateway token rotation fails after secret update
evidence.text: The internal issue reports that the VPN gateway kept using an old token after the secret was updated. Operators resolved it by restarting the vpn-gateway deployment and confirming new sessions used the rotated token.

name: uploaded_heldout_hr_chinese_workflow_preserves_semantics
query: 入职审批流程是怎样的？
notes: CJK workflow query over a new uploaded-style domain should preserve Chinese semantics and answer from HR evidence.

evidence.title: Employee Onboarding Policy
evidence.text: 入职审批流程：候选人接受 offer 后，HR 在 HR > Onboarding 创建入职记录。直属 manager 审批岗位、成本中心和开始日期。IT service desk 根据审批记录创建账号和设备工单。HR 在员工入职日前一天确认材料齐全。

name: uploaded_heldout_facilities_single_doc_direct_evidence
query: 报修空调要走什么流程？
notes: Single-document uploaded-style held-out evidence has low synthetic score but direct same-space evidence; it should not behave like a global Airbyte threshold rejection.

evidence.title: Facilities Request Policy
evidence.text: HVAC repair workflow: employees submit an air-conditioning repair request in Facilities > Requests. The building manager triages the request and assigns a vendor. Urgent workspace temperature issues should receive a vendor response within two business days.

name: uploaded_heldout_implementation_next_step_abstain
query: 这个项目下一步应该怎么改？
notes: Uploaded-style held-out implementation log lacks roadmap evidence. A robust fallback policy should abstain instead of answering from cleanup/git-reset evidence.

evidence.title: Implementation Log
evidence.text: Cleanup notes: do not run git reset on user changes. Ignore .env, .venv, node_modules, __pycache__, and .next output folders during local cleanup. This section is not a roadmap and does not define the next product milestone.
